nasb.text: Now Israel lived in the land of Egypt, in Goshen, and they acquired property in it and were fruitful and became very numerous.

esv.text: Thus Israel settled in the land of Egypt, in the land of Goshen. And they gained possessions in it, and were fruitful and multiplied greatly.

cnv.text: 以色列人住在埃及國的歌珊地，他們在那裡置業繁衍，人數非常眾多。

ccb.text: 以色列人住在埃及的歌珊，在那里获得了产业，人口兴旺。

csbs.text: 以色列人住在埃及的歌珊地。他们在那里置了产业，并且繁衍，大大增多。
